reviews.review_msg: good teacher , but very hard exams
the overall rating i have given is 1/5. his lectures are difficult to understand and mids and finals are too tough. most of the concepts in exams are not even taught in class. would never recommend.

Hard to get a good grade in his class, and mostly do not reply to students' questions. Most importantly, his quizzes and tests are extremely harder than his lectures. Not a good professor. I do not recommend him.

Lots of homework with this professor since that is the way he takes attendance in his online classes. Also, he is very test heavy. Having two tests within three months and a very difficult final exam. Also, the concepts he teach are often also inadequate to equip you for the various quizzes or tests that take place every 2 weeks.
He has passion for math but I barely understood what he was talking about. A lot of homework and midterms are kinda tough. He is going too fast through the lectures

Mr. Mahdad is definitely one of the better math professors I have had in my life. I always disliked math but he made it quite tolerable. He is also very passionate about teaching math as well. Do be warned that classes sometimes feel like they are going on for too long and you may find it boring if you can't concentrate for too long.

Almost failed the course. Mahdad is very kind and passionate about his subject. Answers questions. There is room for him to make the course more interesting, engaging, and coherent. Lectures can get boring. I never really understood where to study for the finals.

Good prof. Mahdad takes all questions and will be really patient to answer them through multiple office hours or even in class. However, his lectures, or the course itself are quite challenging. A tip for everyone viewing this review: If you can solve all his homework questions and get the logic behind, you will succeed this course. Good luck!
Really nice Prof. Subject is hard though.

Good professor as he will explain in details is you're not clear with the question but his lecture is quite boring sometimes. I don't have a strong foundation in math so i find this course is hard for me. Should've taken his math100 instead of this. Midterms are harder than final.

Previously, I had problems with mathematics, so did not expect much from this course, but Mahdad showed himself as a very good teacher, his tests are heavy, but in fact it is very helpful in the final work.
his lecture is simple but a little bit boring. will fall asleep if u take this in the morning. paper is not too difficult , is at the normal level.
Don't take him if you are currently struggling with Math. Just avoid him at all times.

Mahdad explains his materials very clearly and will go over them again if you don't understand anything. Just go over the handouts of the previous week before each in-class quiz and you should be fine with the quizzes. Midterms are fair and final is easy. No need to study from the textbook, just go over the handouts (again) and the review samples.
he is a nice professor ,he makes you practice the stuff on midterms through his quizzes. i would highly recommend to chose him,follow his notes and problems,you'll be good to go.

He is a pretty good prof. He makes math easier and makes the evening class fun. He has good notes and can explain concepts well. He is happy to help you with questions on math.  One of the best prof here. :)
he is a good teacher and nice. i think he is a good teacher for math157
HE IS SO PATIENT PRETTY A LOVELY GUY
The best teacher for this course at FIC in my opinion. Explains materials with the utmost simplicity and takes weekly quizzes that give us an incentive to study.
Very good with proving formulas for better understanding.
His notes are clear and he makes things simple. His accent is cute. Tests can be seemingly easy but are tricky.U get ur $ worth with this math prof.

He know the material well, his homework and midterms are fair, but his final is extremely difficult; seems he'd not care about your grade. I just took his final and I'm 100% sure more than half of my class would fail this time. most of us can only   complete 3 out of 6 questions in final. want a good grade to transfer? don't take his class!
Excellent professor. Very patient, calm, and helpful.

The lectures were dry and his midterms and finals were disproportionately harder than his homework or note examples. He understood the material but could not convey the information properly to the class. Would sometimes jump around in concepts which would make them unnecessarily harder than needed. Was available to help though.

Midterm averages around 40%. A large portion of the class failed. He did not scale, he's also not really on your side about marks. Although he's very clear with material, but issue's the course... materials tough, exams are rough.
The class averages were around 40 percent in terms of midterms. He didn't scale either so a good chunk of the class failed. It's a tough course and profs can only help with the simple concepts.

A prof that has managed to make math seem easier - miracle worker! He's funny, super nice, and somehow is still excited to teach the same things over and over again. Always makes sure we understand before moving on. Great notes. Made my 4 hour night classes much easier to pass by. Consider yourself lucky if you get him as your prof!
great teaching style, and fair midterms if u have studied. but final is difficult.... overall, he is a great prof to take.
his teaching style is great, and makes you involved into the class. midterms are fair, but final is difficult (and some questions are impossible to solve).... overall, he is a great prof to take.
His midterms and final are fair.

Math is a difficult subject in itself and very hard to teach because of its enormity. Mahdad made it as accessible as possible and is very accommodating. He will bump your grade if show progress throughout the course.
He's great at explaining theory and concepts! As well, he's funny and very entertaining in lecture too. His exams tests a lot of theory, so know all your material!
his lecture and notes are clear! explain everything excellent !
everything was well explained. quite a nice prof!
great prof explained everything well, midterms and final were hard but very fair.
Best math prof at SFU his midterms and final were fair but he gives weekly quizzes out different from the homework questions so you have to know your material well

he explains material clearly, his midterms are fair, his final was kind of difficult tho. Make sure you know the last 2 chapters really really well, since final mostly coveres those chapters. Good proff overall . Wish he was teaching 254 or 310 as well.
A+ professor, one of the best math professors at SFU. His midterms and final were fair. Highly recommended professor, he cares and helps his students.
Very good and funny prof.

Good prof. Gives interesting, clear, well-organized lectures and spices them up with sardonic sense of humour. Assignments are a lot of work. Weekly quizzes are tricky, but exams are fair. If you love math, you'll enjoy this class and this prof.
